title: Bryobium punctatum
taxonomy: Bryobium punctatum is classified as a species of orchid, specifically within the genus Bryobium. This genus is part of the subtribe Pterostylidinae, which is a group of terrestrial orchids. The subtribe Pterostylidinae is further classified under the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. The family Orchidaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants, with over 30,000 known species worldwide. Bryobium punctatum is native to Australia and New Guinea.
